breaking_news_suggestions.headline: 8 Consecutive Auto-Regens, 0 Acknowledgments: PRED-105's Silent 11-Day Stretch
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome's daily AI review has regenerated 8 consecutive times — same counts, same badge, same silence on the expired cucumber-growth prediction. After 11+ days past the 2026-04-18 close, the pipeline-canonical non-response has now outlasted the prediction window itself. Per pre-registered rubric: SEVERITY HIGH.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Each regen that holds PRED-105 as PENDING-PROSPECTIVE is another data point confirming the systematic silent-ignore pattern. Eight data points make a streak.
